title: Better Saddle
description: This resource pack makes all the saddles look like the horse saddle. it gets rid of that orange color and gives it a nice brown color.
body:
**Better Saddles** replaces the vanilla saddle texture with a nicer, more appealing design that still fits Minecraft’s original style.
